message:
Running command: # IPs have been updated to v1.7.0! Previously they were v1.6.0.
# Need to update all paths from v1.6.0 -> v1.7.0 AND check other version bumps
# Check all IP versions available
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/ 2>/dev/null

args.command:
# IPs have been updated to v1.7.0! Previously they were v1.6.0.
# Need to update all paths from v1.6.0 -> v1.7.0 AND check other version bumps
# Check all IP versions available
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/ 2>/dev/null
